title: Going to show my little brother episodes 24 6 next week
display_title: Going to show my little brother episodes 24 6 next week
wikitext:
[]: Going to show my little brother episodes 24-6 next week             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Oct 18, 2009 9:58 pm So, as said in the title, I'm going to show my 11-year-old brother the end of EoTV next weekend. We have seen the previous eps over the period of the last two months, and I plan to watch the rest of EoTV and EoE with him as well. So, the point of this thread is "How should I explain the mindfuck sequence? What other stuff should I explain to him as we watch?" Also, feel free to share your experiences with showing Eva to small (prepubescent) children.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:00 pm hmm...at the end ask what parts he doesn't understand and then explain them to him if he wants. i can't stereotype but unless he is really mature for his age most of the meaning and stuff will go right over his head

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:02 pm Just tell him that it is a mystery and the interperation depends on the viewer.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:02 pm eeeeeh....... hard call Leo. Are you talking Asuka's or Pre 3I. For Asuka's I would say that the Angel is a cruel (though technically it isnt ) telepath or psychic wanting to dig through Asuka's mind and she had buried those thoughts because they were painful. For Pre Instrumentality and Instrumentality proper Im not too sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:04 pm Do this:

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:06 pm eeeeeh....... hard call Leo. Are you talking Asuka's or Pre 3I. For Asuka's I would say that the Angel is a cruel (though technically it isnt ) telepath or psychic wanting to dig through Asuka's mind and she had buried those thoughts because they were painful. For Pre Instrumentality and Instrumentality proper Im not too sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:12 pm Eeeh...... sexuality is a hot and tricky subject Leo. I suggest saying that it is Shinji being subject to everyone's thoughts. That it is causing people to become one giant tangy being. That it's combining everyone's soul as one, and theyre leaving their bodies and and the tang is just for effect. LCL (if you have explained it to him through the rest of the series) is what we're made of and that's why the tang when Instrumentality proper begins. Pre-Instrumentality is Shinji's thoughts about everyone and everything alone, and Instrumentality proper is him being exposed to everyones thoughts. For the masturbation scene........ no offense but have him ask agrown up. Its the best I can think of. Parents are best for explaining the birds and the bees; with all respect to Anno-sama and the awesomness that is Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:13 pm I showed my 12-year-old brother the NGE TV series all the way through (not EoE yet). I found that when I explained or pointed out the little subtle details and motifs in previous episodes, he was able to translate 25-6 pretty well on his own. There were still questions, but not half as many as I had expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:15 pm You people are bad for corrupting the innocent youth and you should all feel bad. I kid, I kid.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:17 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Eeeh...... sexuality is a hot and tricky subject Leo. I suggest saying that it is Shinji being subject to everyone's thoughts. That it is causing people to become one giant tangy being. That it's combining everyone's soul as one, and theyre leaving their bodies and and the tang is just for effect. LCL (if you have explained it to him through the rest of the series) is what we're made of and that's why the tang when Instrumentality proper begins. Pre-Instrumentality is Shinji's thoughts about everyone and everything alone, and Instrumentality proper is him being exposed to everyones thoughts. For the masturbation scene........ no offense but have him ask agrown up. Its the best I can think of. Parents are best for explaining the birds and the bees; with all respect to Anno-sama and the awesomness that is Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:20 pm Well.... I know its one of the key scenes of Eva but 11 year old kids, once again IMO shouldn't know about sexuality or masturbation, so maybe you oughta just skip the hospital scene and or fast forward the "jerk off fantasy" part of the helltrain sequence.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:25 pm @ topic Sweet! I wish I had a little brother to show NGE to. That'd be sweet.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:26 pm don't forget the Misato and Kaji sex scene, and there is the part with Rei straddling Shinji although i'm not sure if they're having sex or it's just showing them "becoming one" with the whole hands in chest thing. i don't know how to view it because it doesn't feel like a sex scene when you see it even though where she is sitting isn't coinsidence. anywho, i digress, fast forward most of EoE

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:29 pm Mongoosedog wrote: don't forget the Misato and Kaji sex scene,

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:30 pm actually, i would say wait two to four years before considering telling him about EoE and just tell him EoTV is the end; as confusing as it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:32 pm GGSS wrote: Well.... I know its one of the key scenes of Eva but 11 year old kids, once again IMO shouldn't know about sexuality or masturbation, so maybe you oughta just skip the hospital scene and or fast forward the "jerk off fantasy" part of the helltrain sequence.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 18, 2009 10:34 pm schismatics wrote: Mongoosedog wrote: don't forget the Misato and Kaji sex scene,

[]:             Quote Post by CobraVerde601 » Sun Oct 18, 2009 11:09 pm i just gave my little sister the whole series for her birthday!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 19, 2009 12:10 am CobraVerde601 wrote: i just gave my little sister the whole series for her birthday!
